accessory_categories.name: All Accessories
accessory_categories.description: Browse all available accessories including telematics, GPS, dashcams, and safety equipment.

accessory_categories.name: Telematics & GPS
accessory_categories.description: Vehicle tracking, telematics units, and GPS monitoring hardware with subscription options.

accessory_categories.name: Dashcams
accessory_categories.description: Forward-facing, dual-channel, and 360-degree dash cameras for fleet risk management.

accessory_categories.name: Safety Equipment
accessory_categories.description: Cones, warning triangles, first aid kits, and other driver safety accessories.

accessory_categories.name: Other Accessories
accessory_categories.description: Miscellaneous accessories and add-ons for your fleet.

vehicles.name: 2024 Tesla Model Y Long Range AWD

accessory_products.name: FleetTrack Pro LTE GPS Tracker
accessory_products.description: Hardwired LTE GPS tracker designed for commercial fleets with real-time location, geofencing, and driver behavior reports.

accessory_products.name: EcoTrack Lite Plug-in GPS
accessory_products.description: OBD-II plug-in GPS tracker for light-duty vehicles with simple self-install and usage-based alerts.

accessory_products.name: UltraTrack Max 4G GPS Tracker
accessory_products.description: Premium 4G GPS tracking unit with backup battery, harsh driving detection, and advanced reporting suite.

accessory_products.name: Basic OBD-II GPS Tracker
accessory_products.description: Entry-level OBD-II GPS tracker suitable for small fleets needing simple breadcrumb tracking.

accessory_products.name: RoadGuard Dual HD Dashcam
accessory_products.description: Dual-facing 1080p dashcam capturing road and cabin with G-sensor incident tagging.

accessory_products.name: ClearView 4K Front Dashcam
accessory_products.description: High-resolution 4K front-only dashcam with night vision and 128GB SD card included.

accessory_products.name: High-Visibility Triangle Kit
accessory_products.description: Set of three reflective emergency triangles in a compact storage case.

accessory_products.name: Fleet First Aid Kit - Large
accessory_products.description: OSHA-compliant first aid kit suitable for medium to large fleets.

accessory_products.name: Heavy-Duty Tablet Mount
accessory_products.description: Adjustable dashboard tablet mount compatible with most 8"–11" tablets.

accessory_products.name: Covert Magnetic GPS Housing
accessory_products.description: Rugged magnetic enclosure for GPS trackers, ideal for temporary installations.

accessory_products.name: CloudConnect Fleet Dashcam
accessory_products.description: LTE-connected dashcam with automated upload of critical events to the cloud.

vehicle_lease_options.notes: 36-month closed-end lease, 10,000 miles/year, $0 due at signing for qualified lessees.

Standard Range RWD, autopilot included; excess mileage charged at $0.25/mile.

Includes Level 2 home charger credit for qualifying lessees.
Mid-trim SUV with driver-assist package included.
Dual-motor long-range configuration; connectivity package not included.
Ideal for last-mile delivery fleets; includes basic telematics hardware on 48-month term.
Diesel cargo van configuration with high payload capacity; maintenance package available.

Popular mid-size sedan for sales teams; option to add telematics bundle.
Hatchback configuration; includes all-weather floor mats.
SuperCrew 4x4 suitable for field service crews; towing package included.

Previous model year hybrid SUV; limited inventory available while supplies last.
